enriched_points.expanded_content: This technique utilizes molecular interactions to spontaneously organize nanoparticles into structured arrangements, enhancing properties like mechanical strength and conductivity.

Surface modification involves altering the surface properties of nanoparticles to improve compatibility and interaction with polymers, facilitating better dispersion and performance in nanocomposites.
Chemical grafting attaches functional groups to nanoparticle surfaces, allowing for tailored interactions with polymer matrices, which enhances stability and performance in specific applications.
This method combines different polymers to create a composite material with desirable properties, leveraging synergistic effects to optimize mechanical and thermal characteristics.
